# TradingJournal.com

> Independent trading journal reviews and comparisons. We help traders find the right journaling software.

## Rankings (2026)

1. TradeZella — 4.8/5 — $29–$49/mo — 500+ brokers — Best overall
2. TraderSync — 4.7/5 — $29.95–$79.95/mo — 950+ brokers — Best AI coaching
3. Edgewonk — 4.7/5 — $197/year (~$16/mo) — 60+ importers — Best for psychology
4. Trademetria — 4.0/5 — Free–$39.95/mo — 140+ brokers — Best free option
5. Tradervue — 2.6/5 — Free–$49/mo — 80+ brokers — Legacy platform
